programme.title: Obvious Child
programme.desc: Kehamilan tak terencana seorang komedian berusia dua puluhan memaksanya menghadapi kenyataan sebagai wanita mandiri untuk pertama kalinya.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Donatella V.
programme.desc: Seri “73 Pertanyaan” dari Vogue kembali hadir, menampilkan Donatella Versace di apartemen mewahnya di Milan.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Anna Wintour
programme.desc: Mulai dari kata yang paling tidak disukainya dalam dunia mode hingga alasan mengapa ia selalu mengenakan kacamata hitam Chanel, Pemimpin Redaksi Vogue membagikan 73 hal yang membuatnya menjadi Anna Wintour.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 24 Hours With Rapper YG
programme.desc: Ikuti YG saat ia membagi waktunya antara membuat musik, mengelola lini busananya, dan menjalankan tugas sebagai ayah, semuanya dalam satu hari yang padat.

programme.title: 73 Questions With CL
programme.desc: Baru saja tampil di upacara penutupan Olimpiade di kota kelahirannya, Pyeongchang, Korea Selatan, bintang K-pop CL membuka pintu kamarnya di Hollywood Roosevelt Hotel yang bersejarah di Los Angeles tempat ia menginap sementara saat ini ketika Vogue datang mengetuk pintu dan melontarkan 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi tentang Kanye West, lilin favoritnya, penampilan cameo Borat, Disneyland, “Lamborghini Ungu,” eyeliner sebagai aksesori ideal, menjadi pecinta kucing, dan cara mengucapkan “cheers!” dalam bahasa Korea.

programme.title: The Ballad Of Lefty Brown
programme.desc: Seorang Barat yang mendebarkan dan penuh aksi, The Ballad of Lefty Brown adalah kisah tentang kesetiaan, persahabatan, dan upaya tanpa henti untuk mencapai keadilan.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Gigi Hadid
programme.desc: Supermodel Gigi Hadid memiliki jadwal yang padat dengan penerbangan dan pemotretan. Di sela-sela perjalanannya dari New York ke LA, Gigi mengundang Vogue ke kantor IMG, tempat ia mencoba menjawab 73 Pertanyaan. Gigi menceritakan siapa idola perempuannya, memamerkan keahlian tinjunya, dan menyusun daftar lagu-lagu Taylor Swift favoritnya.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Greta Gerwig
programme.desc: Aktris, pembuat film, dan sutradara film Barbie, Greta Gerwig, menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat sambil berjalan-jalan santai di Sony Pictures Studios. Dengan pemahaman mendalam tentang seperti apa kehidupan sebagai penulis skenario dan sutradara, Greta menjelaskan secara rinci segala hal yang terlibat dalam proses pembuatan filmnya dan menatap masa depannya di industri ini

programme.title: Cut Bank
programme.desc: Kehidupan seorang pemuda terungkap setelah menyaksikan pembunuhan yang dia rekam di kota pedesaannya, Cut Bank.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Greta Gerwig
programme.desc: Aktris, pembuat film, dan sutradara film Barbie, Greta Gerwig, menjawab 73 pertanyaan kilat sambil berjalan-jalan santai di Sony Pictures Studios. programme.title: 73 Questions With Cardi B
programme.desc: Bintang hip-hop ternama Cardi B mengajak Vogue mengunjungi apartemen neneknya di New York City dan menjawab 73 pertanyaan bertubi-tubi. Sambil menidurkan putrinya, Kulture, Cardi B berbincang tentang hubungannya dengan Offset, ketertarikannya pada politik, album terbarunya, serta kondisi terkini hak-hak perempuan.

programme.title: Lost Souls: The Return
programme.desc: “The Return” adalah single kedua dari album “Lost Souls”.

programme.title: 73 Questions With Donatella V.
programme.desc: Seri “73 Pertanyaan” dari Vogue kembali hadir, menampilkan Donatella Versace di apartemen mewahnya di Milan.

programme.title: 73 Questions, Ashley Graham
programme.desc: Ashley menceritakan bagaimana ia bertemu suaminya, produk apa yang benar-benar tak bisa ia tinggalkan, serta bagaimana ia bepergian ke dan dari Fashion Week tanpa repot berkat Lexus yang menyediakan layanan transportasi gratis bagi para desainer, model, editor, pengecer, dan profesional industri sebagai sponsor otomotif resmi New York Fashion Week.

programme.title: Black Flowers
programme.desc: Kisah inspiratif dari lima orang penyintas Holocaust yang memilih seni sebagai sarana untuk menyembuhkan luka masa lalu mereka.

programme.title: 50 Cent Answers The Webs...
programme.desc: Bintang film *Den of Thieves*, 50 Cent, menjawab pertanyaan-pertanyaan yang paling banyak dicari di internet tentang dirinya. Apakah 50 Cent pernah kuliah? Apakah 50 Cent seorang miliarder? Apakah 50 Cent orang Jamaika?? 50 Cent menjawab semua pertanyaan ini dan masih banyak lagi!

programme.title: A Missed Connection
programme.desc: Setelah menemukan percikan dengan seorang wanita di peron kereta, seorang fotografer memposting koneksi yang terlewat di surat kabar tetapi tidak pernah mendengar kabar darinya. Lima tahun kemudian, mereka bertemu lagi saat dalam perjalanan ke pernikahan yang sama dengannya.

programme.title: Jonathan
programme.desc: Seorang pemuda mengetahui bahwa ayahnya yang sedang sekarat pernah sangat mencintai seorang pria.

programme.title: Sinister Tales: The Haunting
programme.desc: Sekelompok teman berkumpul untuk saling menceritakan kisah-kisah menyeramkan yang penuh dengan hantu, misteri, dan kejadian supranatural. Namun, ketika malam semakin larut, mereka menyadari bahwa kisah paling mengerikan bukanlah cerita yang mereka ceritakan, melainkan teror nyata yang mulai menghantui mereka satu per satu.

programme.title: The Christmas Letter
programme.desc: Setiap tahun, copywriter pengangguran Joe Michaels membaca surat Natal tahunan temannya yang kaya raya, dan merasa seperti pecundang. Tapi tahun ini akan berbeda.

programme.title: Laugh Riot: The Misadventure
programme.desc: Frankie Blair Presents: Laugh Riot adalah serial komedi stand-up yang dinamis dan menghibur, menampilkan beragam komedian dengan gaya humor yang unik. Dipandu oleh Tahir Moore dan diproduseri oleh Frankie Blair, acara berenergi tinggi ini menghadirkan tawa segar sekaligus merayakan talenta-talenta berbakat yang selama ini kurang mendapat sorotan.

programme.desc: Bing Slamet yang menjalani profesi sebagai dukun palsu dan telah menipu banyak orang termasuk Ateng dan Iskak. Karena Merasa ditipu, orang-orang yang pernah menjadi korban dukun tersebut bermaksud menangkapnya

programme.title: Pulau Hantu 2
programme.desc: Dante, kembali harus terperangkap di pulau hantu dan harus menyelamatkan diri dari sesosok arwah penasaran yang mengejarnya. Keadaan tambah kacau ketika pulau tersebut didatangi anak-anak muda yang ingin membuat pesta

programme.title: 5 Hot Girls
programme.desc: Yanti yang berhasil lolos dari penculikan yang mengingini hasil temuan tunangannya menghubungi keempat kawannya yang mempunyai keahlian khusus. Berlima mereka menyelematkan tunangan, ibu dan adiknya yang disandera.

programme.title: Kesurupan Jumat Kliwon
programme.desc: Keempat pemuda yang memutuskan untuk bunuh diri karena berbagai masalah. Sebelum bunuh diri, mereka berlibur di rumah tua dekat pantai, yang dimana rumah itu terkenal angker. Terror kepada mereka pun terus berlanjut

programme.title: Serbuan Halilintar
programme.desc: Film ini menceritakan tentang Yulia dan Hendra melawan Ganda dkk, yang berniat merebut kedudukan kepala desa, karena telah merusak ketenangan desa hingga menimbulkan kematian.

programme.title: Daerah Terlarang
programme.desc: Bercerita tentang sekelompok publik figur yang mendapatkan teror hantu pocong pada saat menggarap syuting film horror. Teror dimulai saat mereka tidak sengaja bertemu dengan sosok pocong di sebuah rumah angker.

programme.title: Dunia Mereka
programme.desc: Film ini menceritakan tentang sebuah band yang terdiri dari beberapa orang yang mempertemukan mereka karena selera musik yang sama. Namun dalam perjalanan mereka, berbagai masalah pun berdatangan.

programme.title: Crazy Guys
programme.desc: 3 sahabat sejati yang selalu mendukung untuk semua hal, termasuk kisah sakit hati dengan makhluk yang namanya Cowok.

programme.title: Crazy Girl
programme.desc: Keke bukan sembarang anak perempuan, kepalanya penuh dengan cita-cita dan keinginan. Impian Keke yang semakin dekat, tapi suatu kejadian memaksa Keke untuk merelakan mimpi yang sudah diraihnya itu

programme.title: Mencari Hilal
programme.desc: Bercerita tentang Mahmud yang selalu ingin mengajarkan bahwa Islam itu adalah agama untuk semua persoalan hidup. Dalam perjalannya mencari hilal dengan caranya yang sederhana tanpa menelan biaya sampai milyaran rupiah

programme.title: Love You Love You Not
programme.desc: Sebuah komedi romantis tentang Amira, guru les Bahasa Inggris, dan Juki, pemuda Betawi yang geragasan. Semua dimulai saat Suchin, gadis Thailand yang juga pacar Juki, meminta bantuan Amira, guru les Bahasa Inggrisnya

programme.title: El
programme.desc: Dafychi (Aurelie Moeremans), gadis berkepribadian ganda, tak pernah menyangka bahwa hidupnya yang monoton dan membosankan, tiba-tiba jadi lebih berwarna sejak bertemu Mario Adipati (Achmad Megantara), pengusaha muda sukses

programme.title: Hotline 666
programme.desc: Menceritakan tentang Erza yang terperangkap di sebuah rumah angker. Erza merupakan pengantar pizza, saat dia mengantaran pizza ke sebuah rumah an ternyata dihuni oleh Sandra, Miko, dan Dara.

programme.title: Warkop Tahu Diri Dong
programme.desc: Film komedi dari Warkop DKI mengenai berbagai kisah dari masing-masing personilnya. Ada yang mengenai jebolnya dinding tempat mereka kos akibat Kasino yang sok terampil memasang lukisan, Dono yang mengaku sudah menjadi dokter

programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and his team reveal how adding water can transform any size of garden by creating two incredible water gardens, one outside and one inside - while Alan, Frances Tophill and David Domoney build a stunning outdoor space in a small plot featuring three different but equally spectacular water features for the Peacock family, whose small garden is young and featureless, in Kent, Katie Rushworth reveals how to build an indoor water feature that can transform a bare corner of your home. The Peacocks' young daughter Lily loves splashing around in water, so Alan creates an integrated seating area with a built-in waterfall in one corner by cleverly redesigning the space and tasks Frances with building a beautiful focal point using a free standing sheet of water surrounded by lush plants - however, the cleverest trick of all is David's archway over the path which doubles as a water sheet for the kids to run through and enjoy.

programme.title: Dermot's Taste of Ireland
programme.desc: Dermot O'Leary arrives in Sligo, Yeats country, where the mountains, sea and sky feel like they've barely changed since the poet put them into verse. Local guide Tracey brings that world to life, tracing Yeats' Irish-English existence and the places that shaped him. From there, Dermot heads out onto the bay with Glen and Aisling of Sligo Oysters, getting his hands dirty on a working oyster farm before cooking the catch over an open flame on the shore. In Sligo town, he meets man-of-the-town chef Anthony Gray, who leads him through two of its most treasured food institutions: Clarke's, a family butcher of long standing, and Cosgrove & Sons, a provisions store that looks and feels like it hasn't changed in a century. With their haul gathered, Anthony and Dermot head to his flagship restaurant Eala Bán, where they cook up a proudly Irish Surf 'N' Turf.

programme.desc: The iconic TV series is back, but in a brand-new setting with brand-new prize boxes and a new batch of contestants hoping to win a whopping cash prize - who will have what it takes to beat our brand-new Banker? Now hosted by Stephen Mulhern, the series will see contestants battle it out against the notorious Banker to be in with a chance of winning a life-changing cash prize in a nail-biting game of nerves and intuition. Contestants are confronted with 22 sealed boxes with each one hiding a different amount of money - without knowing what each one contains, the contestant must eliminate the boxes, which are opened one at a time, and the amount of money inside is revealed. Pressure mounts as the player is tempted by the notorious Banker to accept an offer of cash in exchange for what might be inside their box, and as long as the larger cash prizes remain unchosen, the Banker's offers will get higher... but that can all change in an instant if a big cash prize is unveiled.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Suzanne Morton is brought into a hospital Accident and Emergency department with flu-like symptoms - and leaves in a body bag. Detectives Ronnie Brooks and Matt Devlin treat her case as suspicious as they investigate the department, which has had three similar deaths within six months. The ward was extremely busy the night Suzanne died, which makes their job tougher - can they find the killer before another victim is targeted? When the case comes to court, senior crown prosecutor Jacob Thorne is pulled in opposite directions as the chief suspect claims to have been framed for murder by others in his department. With a conspiracy of silence spreading through the hospital staff, it becomes clear that there is more to the case than meets the eye. In order to find the truth, the team must penetrate the hospital staff's web of professional loyalties.

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: This episode, Safe, sees the team investigate the reported kidnapping of a small child. When two-year-old Ryan Stark goes missing from a high street merry-go-round, his distraught mother Kayla reports him kidnapped and a massive police hunt is launched to find the missing toddler. In spite of public appeals and additional manpower, the search seems to throw up more questions than answers. With the investigation seemingly going nowhere, the team have to dig deeper - and they discover that the child had a history with social services before he went missing. Armed with this new information, the team wonder whether Kayla is not being entirely truthful. But with more than one suspect and a complete lack of physical evidence, can they ever get to the bottom of what happened to baby Ryan?

programme.desc: The gripping crime drama continues with an episode in which there may be more to a seemingly cut-and-dried case than meets the eye. When call girl Katka Cizek is found dead in a pool of blood in an upmarket apartment, only one of her admirers seems to fit the bill for the culprit. He was with her on the night of her death, he does not have an alibi and he has everything to lose if his secret obsession with her were to be revealed. The evidence against him seems clear, and when the matter comes to trial, crown prosecutor Alesha Phillips is given the reins to lead the cross-examination. But as she looks further into the case, Alesha begins to suspect that someone has reason to frame the accused. As she digs deeper, determined to find the truth, she uncovers a shattering betrayal which proves that there are no winners in this case.

When the violent pair are brought to trial, defence barrister Phyllis Gladstone claims that one of the two suspects was more innocent victim than vicious killer. programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Feature-length drama. The owner of Easterly Grange Hotel has died as an annual festival begins in the hotel's gardens - Barnaby attends the funeral and learns that the manager of the hotel is missing. The reading of the will reveals that the hotel has been divided among the missing manager, his glamorous wife, the hotel chef and the hotel accountant - after a dog appears with the severed hand of the missing manager, Barnaby begins some serious enquiries. Threatening notes are soon delivered to each of those named in the will - and accidents befall them one by one. One is poisoned by mushrooms, another accidentally shot, another crushed by a falling drinks cabinet and two nearly killed when their van's are sabotaged - Barnaby discovers that there had been a new will entrusted to the hotel manager but that it disappeared when he disappeared. Could that explain why the will's beneficiaries have all suffered fatal accidents... and who the destroying angel that has arranged the deaths is?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Feature-length drama. The disappearance of a villager brings DCI Tom Barnaby face to face with old adversary Melvyn Stockard, who has now reinvented himself as a local squire - when a body is pulled out of a well, Barnaby is convinced that Stockard is somehow involved.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Detective drama series. DCI Vera Stanhope and DS Joe Ashworth investigate a suspicious death in an Army barracks - although the scene has been made to look like a suicide, Vera quickly establishes that Staff Sergeant 'Dev' Deverson was murdered. Sensing a connection to a soldier named Ollie who was killed in Afghanistan, Vera interviews Dev's loyal comrades and Ollie's grieving family while exposing a deeply concealed trauma at the heart of the crime in the process.

Jeremy then conducts an experiment to prove that his new yet unlikely suspect is capable of dragging an adult under the water before pushing his fishing gear past breaking point to discover the river monster known as the Colombian Slasher...

programme.desc: Hi Kiddos adalah sebuah program edukasi untuk anak yang menyajikan video bertema ilmu pengetahuan dan belajar sambil menjelajahi tempat-tempat menarik.

programme.title: Cbeebies
programme.desc: Menghadirkan tayangan favorit Go Jetters & Hey Duggee yang seru dan edukatif dari Cbeebies.Bersama Go Jetters, berpetualang keliling dunia mengenal berbagai tempat ikonik serta pentingnya menjaga lingkungan yang menyenangkan.

programme.title: Main Yuk !
programme.desc: Program yang dirancang untuk membantu anak-anak mempelajari dasar-dasar pengetahuan dan keterampilan melalui visual, gerakan, suara, dan storytelling yang disajikan secara ringan, menyenangkan, edukatif, interaktif & penuh warna.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda
programme.desc: Setelah menyerap Chi, Pahlawan mistis, dari Empat Rasi Bintang, empat anak panda meminta Master Naga untuk mengajari mereka Kung Fu.

programme.title: Toy
programme.desc: Dolanan merupakan program feature dokumenter yang mengangkat kearifan lokal sebuah desa. Seorang anak akan menceritakan keluarga kecilnya serta kehidupan mereka di tempat tinggalnya.

programme.title: Dragons
programme.desc: Menceritakan seorang Putra seorang ketua Viking berteman dengan musuh mereka, seekor naga. Kisah ini berfokus pada kejadian terjadi di desa Berk Viking, di mana peternakan penduduk setempat kerap dicuri & diserang oleh seekor naga

programme.title: Sekala
programme.desc: Program Dongeng tentang seribu satu kisah legenda dengan berbagai cerita yang di bawakan oleh teman - teman dongeng.

programme.title: Petualangan Cipung & Monstar
programme.desc: Petualangan Cipung dan Monstar adalah Program animasi yang menceritakan tentang petualangan Cipung bersama Dimi, Ilmi, Kimi dan si Sammi. Dalam cerita ini mereka semua bersahabat dengan Cipung.

programme.title: Agent Binky
programme.desc: Serial ini mengikuti petualangan Binky, seekor kucing rumah muda yang hitam dan putih, setelah Dia menjadi kucing luar angkasa, sedang dalam misi untuk melindungi keluarga manusia dari ancaman antar bintang.

programme.title: Abominable And The Invisible City
programme.desc: Serial Animasi yang melanjutkan kisah petualangan Yi Jin dan Peng dari film 'Abominable'. Mereka sekarang harus melindungi makhluk ajaib bernama Everest dan dunia tak kasat mata dari orang orang yang ingin mengeksploitasinya.

programme.title: Kring Kring Ada Cerita
programme.desc: Sebuah Program yang berisikan pesan kebaikan yang disampaikan melalui dongeng, lagu dan drama singkat yang dibawakan oleh anak - anak.

programme.title: Menggapai Mimpi
programme.desc: Program features tentang anak - anak sekolah yang berjuang dalam menggapai mimpi. Baik dalam dunia pendidikan formal maupun non formal mereka yang tetap semangat dalam meraih cita - citanya.

programme.title: Madam Rose
programme.desc: Keira seorang gadis lugu yang terpaksa berjuang melawan dunia hitam dan menjadi pengedar narkoba, demi membiayai hidup Ibu dan Adiknya serta adanya niat membalas dendam kepada seseorang.

programme.title: Really Horror
programme.desc: Cak Lontong dan anak indigo Naomi Angelia Sea akan membahas dan membedah hal-hal horor dengan tema-tema yang seru. Kita akan buktikan bersama apakah itu nyata atau hanya gosip saja.

programme.title: Jin Qorin
programme.desc: Seno (Marthino Lio) sangat mencintai istrinya Alya (Tyara Vanessa) dan putrinya Reva (Kanaya Gleadys). Tetapi, ada rahasia besar yang harus ditutupi Seno di dalam rumah tangganya

programme.title: Dapil Komeng
programme.desc: Sketsa Komedi yang menceritakan kelucuan Komeng dalam mewujudkan mimpinya dengan cara masuk ke lemari rahasia yang akan membawanya kemana saja dan bertemu siapa saja yang dia inginkan

programme.title: Bisik Hati Lara
programme.desc: LARA sebagai anak sulung, tak punya pilihan selain harus mencari pekerjaan tambahan, demi adik satu- satunya, LENA, bisa melanjutkan SMA nya sampai lulus, sembari memastikan terapi pengobatan Ibu.

programme.title: Brata S1
programme.desc: Brata, seorang detektif muda sedang menyelidiki kasus pembunuhan mutilasi. Ketika Vera, seorang dokter forensik memeriksa korban, dia menemukan bahwa mereka berasal dari 5 korban berbeda.

programme.title: Angling Dharma S2
programme.desc: Perpecahan terjadi ketika Kerajaan Malwapati yang dipimpin oleh Prabu Angling Dharma disulut oleh perseteruan dengan Syudawirat untuk memperebutkan.

programme.title: Trip Among Rans
programme.desc: Pergi berlibur ditengah masa PSBB membuat Raffi dan nagita menjadi super heboh dalam mempersiapkan segala kebutuhan liburannya demi mendapatkan liburan yang aman dan tetap nyaman

programme.title: Negeri 5 Menara
programme.desc: Negeri 5 Menara series bercerita tentang Alif, pemuda minangkabau memiliki cita-cita tinggi. Ia ingin sekolah di ITB & menjadi sosok seperti idolanya, B.J. Habibie. Sayangnya keinginan Alif tidak mendapat respon baik dari ibunya.

programme.title: Signal
programme.desc: Angkie dilahirkan sebagai gadis yang cantik dan normal. Namun, pada usia 10 tahun tiba-tiba pendengarannya berkurang secara drastis. Dokter memvonisnya kehilangan pendengaran selamanya.

programme.title: Warkop Reborn 3
programme.desc: Ditugaskan sebagai agen polisi rahasia, Dono, Kasino & Indro terlibat dalam sebuah pembuatan film komedi bersama Inka, artis sinetron hijrah ke dunia film. Namun mereka justru terjebak bersama disebuah ruangan hingga jatuh pingsan

programme.title: CLBK The Series
programme.desc: Mini series yang menceritakan suka dan duka mencari pasangan melalui kencan buta.

programme.title: Mr Bean Animation
programme.desc: Mr. Bean laki-laki yang mempunyai sikap sedikit kekanak-kanakan yang berusaha bertahan hidup di kota London dan sangat kompetititf. Dalam series animasi, ia digambarkan lebih beruntung dan kompeten dari versi live actionya.

programme.title: Apose Boss Baru S3
programme.desc: Menceritakan tentang usaha Andre kembali kepada Surya. Selain Andre, Dicky juga kehilangan jabatannya sebagai boss karena skandalnya ketahuan. Karena skandal Dicky, posisi CEO kini diganti dengan Bos Baru yaitu Ayu Ting-Ting.

programme.title: Hidayah
programme.desc: Terbongkarnya masa lalu Bahri sebagai napi membuat warga Mekarwangi mengusirnya. Untuk menyelamatkan dirinya dan desanya, Bahri berusaha mendapatkan kembali bimbingannya dan memperkuat imannya.

programme.title: Apose Boss Baru S3
programme.desc: Menceritakan tentang usaha Andre kembali kepada Surya. Selain Andre, Dicky juga kehilangan jabatannya sebagai boss karena skandalnya ketahuan. Karena skandal Dicky, posisi CEO kini diganti dengan Bos Baru yaitu Ayu Ting-Ting.

programme.title: Assalamualaikum Beijing
programme.desc: Sehari sebelum pernikahan dilangsungkan, Asmara mendapatkan kenyataan pahit bahwa kekasihnya, Dewa ternyata sempat selingkuh dengan teman sekantornya Anita. Walau Dewa memohon pernikahan tetap dilanjutkan Asma terlanjur patah hati

programme.title: Waktunya Srimulat Bercyanda
programme.desc: Program Sitkom dengan Srimulat, group lawak terbesar dan terpopuler serta memiliki penggemar dari berbagai kalangan masyarakat yang menampilkan kisah-kisah lucu dan sedang menjadi topik hangat

programme.title: Skaya & The Big Boss
programme.desc: Skaya dan Skara adalah kembar cewek-cowok tapi beda sekolah dan karakter. Suatu ketika Skara sakit dan harus menjalani perawatan medis sehingga Skaya terpaksa harus menyamar menjadi Skara di asrama.

programme.title: Princess And The Boss
programme.desc: Demi menjadi beauty influencer sukses, keira membuat video kritik untuk lini kosmetik ""beaucity"". Sayangnya, video itu berdampak buruk pada hubungan bisnis ayahnya, sehingga keira harus memperbaikinya.

programme.title: Mr Bean Animation
programme.desc: Mr. Bean laki-laki yang mempunyai sikap sedikit kekanak-kanakan yang berusaha bertahan hidup di kota London dan sangat kompetititf. Dalam series animasi, ia digambarkan lebih beruntung dan kompeten dari versi live actionya.

programme.title: Sincerely
programme.desc: Drama romantis yang mengikuti Fajar, seorang people pleaser yang menjadi asisten pribadi Farah, CEO perfeksionis. Fajar terjebak dilema saat ditugaskan memata-matai Farah, namun justru jatuh cinta dan terlibat konflik rumit.

programme.title: Negeri 5 Menara
programme.desc: Negeri 5 Menara series bercerita tentang Alif, pemuda minangkabau memiliki cita-cita tinggi. Ia ingin sekolah di ITB & menjadi sosok seperti idolanya, B.J. Habibie. Sayangnya keinginan Alif tidak mendapat respon baik dari ibunya.

programme.title: Diary Putih Abu Abu
programme.desc: Sekelompok cewek yang bersekolah di pinggiran Jakarta bertemu dan bersahabat karena memiliki kesamaan. Keakraban mereka mulai dikenal karena konten yang sering mereka posting di social media.

programme.title: Montage
programme.desc: Program magazine tentang movie & series review, menghadirkan para cast dan mengkombinasikan game show

programme.title: Ikatan Cinta
programme.desc: Berkisah tentang 2 bersaudara Andin dan Elsa yang tanpa sengaja mencintai pria yang sama yaitu Nino. Hubungan mereka berdua yang memang tidak pernah baik menjadi semakin buruk setelah Nino menikah dengan Andin.

programme.title: Backpacker Hajj
programme.desc: Mada memberontak kepada Tuhan, karena sudah merenggut ibunya. Ia juga kehilangan cinta yang membuatnya patah hati. Marah pada kenyataan, ia kemudian memutuskan untuk menjadi backpacker dan hidup bebas.

programme.title: Mariposa
programme.desc: Iqbal Guanna seperti kupu-kupu Mariposa bagi Natasha Kay Loovy atau Acha. Tiap kali didekati ia selalu menghindar. Acha bertekad ingin mendapatkan hati Iqbal, seorang cowok cakep, pintar dan dikenal berhati dingin.

programme.desc: Mr. Bean laki-laki yang mempunyai sikap sedikit kekanak-kanakan yang berusaha bertahan hidup di kota London dan sangat kompetititf. Dalam series animasi, ia digambarkan lebih beruntung dan kompeten dari versi live actionya.

programme.desc: From 2024. Lynn and her friends "help" other students with their exams. As the cheating ring expands, Lynn gets the opportunity of a lifetime: She can help hundreds of students cheat, thus giving the middle finger to the entire US education system.

programme.title: The Legend of Ochi
programme.desc: From 2025. In a remote village on the island of Carpathia, a shy girl grows up fearing a mysterious species of animal known as the ochi. But when she discovers that an injured ochi cub has been left behind, she escapes.

programme.title: Genie
programme.desc: From 2023. With his job, life and family disintegrating around him, Bernard dusts off a jewelery box and inadvertently releases the spirit Flora, who may be able to help him.

programme.title: A Thousand and One
programme.desc: From 2023. The uncompromising Inez kidnaps her son Terry from child welfare. With their secret and each other to look after, mother and son try to recreate a sense of belonging in New York.

programme.title: Polite Society
programme.desc: From 2023. Martial artist Ria Khan intends to save her older sister Lena from her impending wedding. Ria enlists her friends to help her attempt to pull off a spectacular wedding coup in the name of independence and sisterhood.

programme.title: Hood
programme.desc: From 2025. A determined CEO who is on the brink of an exit contract of NOK 250 million must gather his co-founders. But a betrayed partner strikes back, forcing a power struggle.

programme.title: What Happens Later
programme.desc: From 2023. Two ex-boyfriends, Bill (David Duchovny) and Willa (Meg Ryan) get stuck in the snow overnight at a regional airport.

programme.title: Horizon: An American Saga - Chapter 1

programme.title: Kill Guard
programme.desc: From 2023. A group of young environmental activists decide to carry out an action by vandalizing a furniture department store after closing time. Their plan goes horribly wrong when they are locked in by a crazy security guard with a cruel passion for primitive hunting.

programme.title: Blink Twice
programme.desc: From 2024. Tech billionaire Slater King invites waitress Frida to join him and his friends on a dream vacation to his private island. As the wild nights give way to sunny days, the guests on the island begin to feel that something is not right

programme.title: Kill the Jockey
programme.desc: From 2024. When an accident takes the life of a valuable competition horse, former star jockey Remo disappears into the underworld without a trace. With both criminal forces and his partner Abril on his heels, he is drawn ever deeper into a vortex of guilt

programme.title: The Long Game
programme.desc: From 2024. School inspector JB Peña moves to Del Rio, Texas, and dreams of membership in the all-white country club. Rejected because of the color of his skin, he bonds with young Latin American caddies with their own course.

programme.desc: From 2022. A young boy discovers the secret headquarters of the world's most powerful superhero - hidden right under his home! – and must defend it with his friends while the villains attack.

programme.title: Devotion
programme.desc: From 2022. Two American fighter pilots risk their lives during the Korean War and become the fleet's most decorated pilots.

programme.title: The Apprentice
programme.desc: From 2024. Donald Trump started his real estate business in 1970s and 80s New York with the help of infamous lawyer Roy Cohn. Determined to step out of his father's shadow, the young Trump met Cohn, who became an important figure in his life.

programme.title: The Crow
programme.desc: From 2024. Soulmates Eric and Shelly are brutally murdered when the demons from her dark past overtake them. Eric gets a chance to save the love of his life, but must sacrifice himself and travel through the worlds of the living and the dead to get revenge.

programme.desc: From 2024. The producers of M3GAN plunge from the timer into the deepest darkness of horror with the supernatural thriller Night Swim. Based on the 2014 short film by Rod Blackhurst and Bryce McGuire.

programme.desc: From 2017. Despite old traditions and family expectations, Pakistani Kumail begins a relationship with Emily, an American girl. A love doomed to failure.

programme.desc: From 2019. A corporate lawyer takes on an environmental lawsuit against a chemical company, revealing a long history of drinking water contamination.

programme.title: White Chicks
programme.desc: From 2004. Ambitious but down-on-his-luck FBI agents Marcus and Kevin are hanging on by a tightrope at work and must go undercover as two blonde diva sisters to keep their jobs.

programme.title: You're Not You
programme.desc: From 2014. The successful concert pianist Kate, who is affected by the incurable disease ALS. Her family offers the best carers, but Kate falls for the awkward and completely incompetent Bec.

programme.title: The Tourist
programme.desc: From 2010. Frank is an American tourist visiting Italy to heal a broken heart. Elise is a unique woman who intentionally crosses his path. With the beautiful Venice as a backdrop, they enter into a dangerous flirtation.

programme.title: The passionate liar
programme.desc: From 1997. Lawyer Fletcher Reede keeps making promises to his son he can't keep. But when Fletcher forgets his son's birthday, which he has promised to come to, his son gets enough.

programme.title: Letters to Juliet
programme.desc: From 2010. Do you believe in the great love? Sophie is on holiday with her Italian boyfriend in Verona - Romeo and Juliet's hometown - when she stumbles across a dusty love letter, written 50 years ago.

programme.title: Fatale
programme.desc: From 2020. After a wild night together, Derrick, a successful sports agent, sees his perfect life slowly disappear when he discovers that the sexy and mysterious woman he risked everything for is a strong-willed police detective.

programme.title: I think I love you
programme.desc: From 2025. A coming-of-age drama about Anders, a gifted dancer shaped by trauma and passion. Through dance, he confronts his past to find healing.

programme.title: Inglourious Basterds
programme.desc: From 2009. In Nazi-occupied France, a group of Jewish-American soldiers are selected to spread fear in the Third Reich by torturing and murdering Nazis.

programme.title: Prisoner's Daughter
programme.desc: From 2022. Max is released on parole after serving twelve years in prison. The condition of his release is that he lives with his daughter Maxine, a daughter he has lost contact with and who has a son he has never met.

programme.title: American Hustle
programme.desc: From 2013. The brilliant swindler Irving Rosenfeld and his beautiful and cunning partner Sydney Prosser make a living by giving people fake loans.

programme.desc: Oliver and Dov respond to a break-in at a downtown high school only to discover they've been pranked; their armed squad car has been stolen out from under them; the officers hit the streets to recover the stolen vehicle.

programme.title: The Hunger Games: Mockingjay Part 2
programme.desc: With the nation of Panem in a full scale war, Katniss confronts President Snow in the final showdown.

programme.title: The Legend 2
programme.desc: Fong Sai Yuk joins the Red Flower revolution to topple the Manchus and restore the Ming. Amidst high-flying martial arts and rigid society demands, the legendary hero must also manage the chaos of his personal life, saddled with two presumptive wives!

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: In *Waterworld*, Kevin Costner stars as a lone maverick in a flooded future Earth, protecting a mother and daughter from a tribe of ruthless nomads. Dennis Hopper delivers a memorable villainous performance in this thrilling adventure.

programme.title: Tai Chi Master
programme.desc: Two friends, ex Shaolin monks, part ways as they brush with the ongoing rebellion against the government. The ambitious one rises up to be a powerful military commander, while his betrayed friend resorts to learn the calm ways of Tai Chi.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: In *Oblivion*, Tom Cruise stars as a man on a journey of redemption in a future Earth. Directed by the creator of *TRON: Legacy*, it's a visually stunning sci-fi adventure about confronting the past to save humanity.

programme.title: Oblivion
programme.desc: Jack Harper, seorang tukang reparasi drone yang ditempatkan di Bumi yang telah dirusak oleh perang dengan makhluk luar angkasa, mempertanyakan identitasnya setelah menyelamatkan wanita yang terus muncul dalam mimpinya.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Jean-Claude Van Damme stars in this John Woo action thriller where a man battles a deadly group that hunts humans for sport. Also features Lance Henriksen and Wilford Brimley.

programme.title: Hard Target
programme.desc: Seorang wanita menyewa seorang gelandangan sebagai pemandunya menjelajahi New Orleans untuk mencari ayahnya yang hilang. Dalam prosesnya, mereka menemukan permainan kucing-kucingan yang mematikan di balik hilangnya ayahnya.

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Corrupt tycoon kills witness to a crime. Only the girlfriend of a businessman with Chinese govt. ties saw it. Beijing bodyguard helps Hong Kong police protect her. But he and the witness develop feelings, complicating matters.

programme.title: The Bodyguard From Beijing
programme.desc: Seorang taipan korup membunuh saksi kejahatan. Hanya pacar seorang pengusaha yang memiliki hubungan dengan pemerintah Tiongkok yang melihat kejadian tersebut. Pengawal dari Beijing membantu polisi Hong Kong melindunginya. Namun, ia dan saksi tersebut mulai memiliki perasaan, yang memperumit keadaan.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs. Evil Dead 2: Ultimate Power
programme.desc: A kung fu fighter's Taoist priest friend has turned into a vampire, hell-bent on leading his legion of vampires to bring eternal darkness to the nation.

programme.title: Shaolin Vs Evil Dead 2
programme.desc: Alur cerita semakin rumit ketika para pahlawan, Pak dan Hak, menemukan rencana mengerikan dari seorang jenius jahat bernama "DR. Magma" yang menghidupkan kembali orang mati yang jahat dan memaksa mereka melawan para biksu Shaolin yang telah menguasai seni bela diri.

programme.title: The Hunger Games
programme.desc: Every district in the nation of Panem must send a boy and girl to fight to the death in the annual Hunger Games competition. Jennifer Lawrence is 16-year-old Katniss Everdeen, who volunteers to take her younger sister's place in the games.

programme.title: The Hunger Games

programme.title: 10.5 Apocalypse Part 2
programme.desc: A massive earthquake creates a chain of events that threaten two of the largest nuclear reactors.

programme.desc: Hotel-hotel di Las Vegas telah ambruk ke dalam tanah, Dr. Hill dan para penyintas yang tersisa berpacu untuk melarikan diri. Sementara itu, gempa bumi dahsyat mengancam akan membelah Amerika Utara menjadi dua dan pembangkit listrik tenaga nuklir berada tepat di jalurnya.

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: 125 years of Mercedes Benz - The largest Mercedes Benz meets at Berlin Tempelhof Airport with lots of highlights such as the legendary Silver Arrows and their even more legendary drivers, visitors and classic vehicles from all over the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The open-air season can start with these three convertibles! Smart is sending the latest version of its roofless dwarf to dealers. It is available as a 3-cylinder petrol engine with 71 or 90 hp. The Mini Convertible is bigger – and not just under the hood. It offers space for four people and the output ranges from 105 to 190 hp. When it comes to pure roadster feeling, there can only be one – the Mazda MX-5. The fourth generation of the topless classic in Perfect Ride. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: Super Seven – when you hear these words, car fans first think of Lotus. Because Colin Chapman developed the open kit racer, i.e. a kit car, in the 1950s. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Carbon fiber on motorcycles – does that make sense? Carbon: The fabric structure of the magical material from Formula 1 shimmers with high quality. Highly priced, but ultra stable and ultra light and therefore extremely attractive for racing and street motorcycles. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: The oil states in the Gulf – Actually everything here is big, bigger, biggest. Only an exclusive group of people like it Mini. Why? How can such a small car put such a big smile on people's faces? Fans come to the mini-festival from all over Arabia. Our research for mini-crazy people starts right here, in Dubai. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The Isle of Man Tourist Trophy is considered the toughest and most dangerous motorcycle race in the world, with riders reaching speeds of up to 200mph. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: An inconspicuous industrial building in Regensburg, Bavaria. The most innovative German bicycle manufacturer is currently based here: PG Bikes. The Regensburg-based company develops and produces electric bikes with a retro look. The boss and idea generator of PG Bikes is 33-year-old Manuel Ostner. After owning his own scooter workshop, he began pimping up bicycles and eventually producing e-bikes. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: They are spectacular and environmentally friendly, the most extravagant and fastest electric and hybrid cars in the world: whether Tesla, McLaren P1, Ferrari La Ferrari or Renovo Coupe, the battery- and hybrid-powered cars impress not only with their fascinating design, but also with intelligent technology, breathtaking acceleration and unique dynamics. Dream Cars presents the most exciting e-cars in the world. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: Their reputation is legendary, rally enthusiasts adore them: the monster rally cars of the so-called Group B. At the beginning of the 80s, a new classification entered rally sport. Suddenly turbocharged all-wheel-drive racing vehicles with up to 500 hp race across the international slopes. The drivers can barely control the vehicles, but with their sound and unbridled power they exert a huge fascination. Only the most serious accidents with dead drivers and fans put an end to the absolute irrationality. Today these cars enjoy cult status and are expensive collector's items. Also legendary: the BMW M E30 in the DTM version. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: The new mobile magazine presents the latest trends and innovations in the automotive industry every week. Whether compact everyday heroes, windy city runabouts for the urban jungle, beefy SUVs for family trips or modern electric and hydrogen vehicles: our experts will take you on a test drive through the world of automobility of today and tomorrow. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: If there is a typical BMW, it is the BMW 3 Series. It's fast, it's cult, it's the epitome of the sports sedan: the BMW 3 Series. Since its debut in 1975, the 3 Series has been the undisputed leader of the premium segment. More than 13 million customers worldwide have chosen a BMW 3 Series. The 3 Series is the right car for every requirement: it is a family sedan, sports car, tuning object and racing car. Car History shows all models and the entire history of the '3 Series'. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name Green Hell. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many racers at heart race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the Green Hell is a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: This time in Enduropark Training – Shirin takes part in an Enduro; Take part in off-road training at the Enduropark Hechlingen and realize that it is anything but a picnic. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The latest innovations in the automotive industry have been presented in Paris since 1898. This makes the Paris Motor Show the oldest trade fair in the world and provides an insight into the automotive world of tomorrow. One attempt by manufacturers is to replace the traditional combustion engine with alternative drives. Mercedes-Benz founded the Generation EQ sub-brand specifically for this purpose. Under the slogan "think new", Volkswagen wants to introduce 20 new electric models by 2020 and finally put the diesel scandal behind it. In addition to the drive of the future, Perfect Ride presents the manufacturers' design visions. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Rearview mirror puts the NSU Ro 80 in the spotlight today. With its revolutionary aerodynamic body and its new engine technology, a Wankel engine, it caused a sensation when it first appeared in 1967. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Pimping, boarding, showing off - today's topics in tuning: Racing flounder with motorcycle power - we're hitting the Hockenheimring in magic X one. Full blast: The D1 Drift Championship – driving sideways at the absolute limit. Tuning EXPO Saarbruecken: 1000 cars, 230 exhibitors and the choice of the Tuning Expo Cover Girl (channel info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: The Stunt Heroes are on tour! On an industrial site in Thuringia they find the ideal place to jump with their stunt car across a moving truck trailer. Problem: the trailer is brand new and must under no circumstances be broken... A special challenge for stunt coordinator Domi and his team! (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: In this episode, presenter Martin Utberg accompanies visitors to the Cars & Friends event at the Hans-Peter Porsche Traumwerk in Anger near Salzburg through a weekend full of automotive passion and enthusiasm. The focus throughout the day will be on motorsport legends Walter Röhrl, Christian Geistdörfer and Hans Joachim Strietzel Stuck, who will create enormous enthusiasm among visitors. Top Speed ​​is also taking part in the celebrations surrounding the 50th anniversary of the VW Golf GTI, where hundreds of Golf owners from Germany and Austria travel to the dream factory. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: Compact high-performance models have a long-standing tradition at BMW. From the 2002 turbo to the 1 Series M Coupe to the current M2. We take a closer look at the second generation and test the drifting potential, racing and everyday qualities of the M2. What does he do best? We also look at its history and development and take a look at its competitors. (Station info).

programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: UIM Aquabike World Championship 2025
programme.sub-title: GP of Italy, Ski Division, Olbia

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: In this episode of the TT2024 we are bringing the second race of the super athletes and the super twins in a double pack. The opportunity for Hicky and Davey to counter and for Michael Dunlop to further increase his record winning account at the TT. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg takes the audience to the Klassikwelt Bodensee in Friedrichshafen, an event that is much more than a classic car fair. In addition to vintage and youngtimers, visitors can expect a varied program with demonstration drives of historic racing cars, an air show, a historic paddock and numerous encounters with collectors, racing drivers and enthusiasts. Top Speed ​​discovers why the Klassikwelt Bodensee is one of the most diverse classical events in Europe. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg takes part in the Spalatin Historic, a one-day classic car rally in aid of a good cause. Together with organizer Stefan von Heyden, Martin discovers the Franconian region. During the various breaks, entertaining special stages ensure many smiling faces among participants and spectators. In this program, Top Speed ​​also takes viewers to Lucerne, where Martin gets involved behind the scenes at a classic car auction by the Oldtimer Galerie Toffen at the Swiss Classic World. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. In 1997 Ferrari celebrated the company's 50th birthday. At that time, Wolfgang Rother followed the Ferrari myth and collected his first driving impressions with the Ferrari 550 Maranello. (Station info).

programme.title: Racing Files
programme.desc: Bitter fights for championship titles, fierce duels for race victories and even disputes between teammates: motorsport has been characterized by feuds since its early days. Even in Formula 1 there are always heated rivalries and duels. The Racing Files looks at the exciting battles for world championship titles in the premier class of formula racing. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: In this episode of the TT2024 we are bringing the second race of the super athletes and the super twins in a double pack. The opportunity for Hicky and Davey to counter and for Michael Dunlop to further increase his record winning account at the TT. (Station info).

The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many racers at heart race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the Green Hell is a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: This time in Enduropark Training – Shirin takes part in an Enduro; Take part in off-road training at the Enduropark Hechlingen and realize that it is anything but a picnic. (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The latest innovations in the automotive industry have been presented in Paris since 1898. This makes the Paris Motor Show the oldest trade fair in the world and provides an insight into the automotive world of tomorrow. One attempt by manufacturers is to replace the traditional combustion engine with alternative drives. Mercedes-Benz founded the Generation EQ sub-brand specifically for this purpose. Under the slogan "think new", Volkswagen wants to introduce 20 new electric models by 2020 and finally put the diesel scandal behind it. In addition to the drive of the future, Perfect Ride presents the manufacturers' design visions. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Rearview mirror puts the NSU Ro 80 in the spotlight today. With its revolutionary aerodynamic body and its new engine technology, a Wankel engine, it caused a sensation when it first appeared in 1967. (Station info).

programme.title: A&E
programme.desc: The West Midlands Ambulance Service is called to millions of emergencies every year. The operations are often so intense that treatment begins on the street. The team of dedicated doctors and paramedics has the daily task of saving lives. (Station info).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.desc: Assistance systems that are normal in cars usually seem exotic or even unthinkable on two-wheelers. However, this no longer applies to the blind spot warning system, which BMW is now offering for the first time. Ideal for the dense traffic in big cities, the home territory of the new maxi scooter C 650 GT. We test the new 60 hp large scooter including the assistance system in Valencia and find out in heavy rush hour traffic whether Side View Assist is an annoying paternalism - or perhaps a real help that could soon also come to motorcycles. (Station info).

programme.title: Mission Mobility
programme.desc: A container on a gravel lot, surrounded by a colorful mix of used cars, some still in good condition, others a little polished, the previous owner has already left his fingerprint here. What is behind these slightly cranky-looking car dealers? In Motorvision TV, people in the automotive profession tell their stories. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: In this episode of the TT2024 we are bringing the second race of the super athletes and the super twins in a double pack. The opportunity for Hicky and Davey to counter and for Michael Dunlop to further increase his record winning account at the TT. (Station info).

programme.title: Made in....
programme.desc: For the first time, it was possible to look over the shoulders of the developers for five years. From the idea to the finished car. After a design competition, eight models are shortlisted. Eight comparable vehicles will be presented to 500 test customers. A jury will propose two of the models for the final. The last big design decision has been made. Today there is a winner. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: How will we transport goods and people in the future? The pack mules on our roads are also evolving and moving with the times. VW is working with Ford to save costs and pool expertise on the new van. At Volvo, safety has always been a priority – and that also applies to its trucks. And 5 exciting facts about the Mercedes eCitaro NMC4. (Station info).

programme.title: Dream Cars
programme.desc: Whether Jaguar F-Type, Aston Martin Vanquish Volante or Bentley Continental, English convertibles are elegant and exclusive and, they are fun. English convertibles enjoy cult status all over the world because, after all, the fun of open and fast two-seaters was invented in England. English roadsters offer more sporting spirit than any other, equipped with power, luxury and elegance, they are the most fascinating convertibles of all. Rolls Royce Phantom Drophead, Jaguar F-Type or Aston Martin Vanquish Volante, Dream Cars presents the most breathtaking English convertibles of all time. (Station info).

programme.title: Crash
programme.desc: When ambition exceeds driving ability and when well-secured racing professionals are carried out of the curve, then we are there with the camera. Breathtaking stunts of professional drivers and slapsticks of sophisticated tin bullets. Spectacular scenes in which no one is harmed. (Station info).

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: The US brand Cadillac from Detroit stands for the American way of drive and exuberant luxury made in the USA. The Cadillac Series 62 Convertible from 1949 was the first US car to have the famous and often quoted tail fins. A beefy V8 engine, automatic transmission and electric top are a given for a Caddy of this era. Classic Ride revives the American Way of Drive with the tailfin monster. (Station info).

programme.title: Cars + Life
programme.desc: In addition to the classic Sportback variant, Audi also offers the A3 as a sedan. We subjected this model to extensive practical testing. Also: the Lexus RX, the revised version of the premium SUV from Toyota's luxury brand on the test site in Ibiza. And: Volkswagen is also launching a new model variant of the e-Up! after. (Station info).

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: They are square and angular, round and beautiful. Solid and safe, indestructible and comfortable: The old Swedes from Volvo. Every model is a classic, every model is a car to dream about. (Station info).

programme.title: Nordschleife
programme.desc: Racing legend Jackie Stewart once described the Nordschleife of the Nürburgring as a multi-limbed monster and gave it the name 'Green Hell'. The legendary track is also regularly accessible to the general public. Many “racers at heart” race through Schwedenkreuz, Fuchsrohre, Kesselchen and Karussell in their private cars. Once through the “Green Hell” a dream for many that no one has to stay. Nordschleife fans take the spectators on board and tell them what they associate with the ring. (Station info).

programme.title: On Tour
programme.desc: When you glide the car on two tires, that's it, we're on tour. Today in Dinslaken and that is the hometown of the Bosslé Helldrivers and it has been a huge family business for forty years. They show us a crazy stunt show and we're there! (Station info).

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The coupe shape makes cars sexy. It's partly a question of faith and partly a question of utility whether you choose a classic two-door coupé like the Mercedes E400 - or the big brother CLS with four doors. The trendsetter of the coupé-limousine has had a number of imitators. The VW Arteon competes with the CLS in a different price segment. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. Today a treat for sports car connoisseurs: the Aston Martin V8 Vantage, the British coupé in the spotlight. And an insight into a life on two wheels: Ernst Jakob Henne set 76 world speed records on BMW machines. (Station info).

programme.title: Tuning – it doesn’t get any lower than that!
programme.desc: Premium tuners and factory tuners: More and more horsepower, better and better sound, ever lower chassis, there are no limits. The finest tuning has to offer. Tips and tricks for lowering, repairing and pimping up. We show you what you can do and how to do it. Lotus blossoms, lowriders and lascivious sluts - these are among the topics in tuning today. The test team goes full throttle again and chases the Komo-Tec Elise with 230 hp on the Nordschleife. (Station info).

programme.title: Stunt Heroes
programme.desc: This episode of Stunt Heroes is all about stunt driver Christoph Knobloch called Knobi. He drives over a ramp at 50 km/h and crashes into cars stacked on top of each other. The dangerous thing about the stunt: several gasoline barrels explode at the same time! If something goes wrong, Knobi is also in danger.... (channel info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: At the Retro Classics in Stuttgart, presenter Martin Utberg is one of the crowd pullers at the trade fair with his daily stage talks in Hall 10. He welcomes two prominent guests per day in front of a large live audience and talks to them about motorsport, personal experiences and the fascination of classic automobiles. In part 2, Martin speaks to several guests. (Station info).

programme.title: Super Cars
programme.desc: From racetrack legends to sporty luxury road cruisers: no automobile manufacturer manages the balancing act between driving pleasure and comfort as well as BMW. With 550 hp and lightweight construction, the M4 CSL is a race track icon. We test it and show its story. What does the BMW M760e stand for? The power says driver's sedan! The luxurious furnishings speak for danger. We'll find out. (Station info).

programme.title: Rear view mirror
programme.desc: The highlights from all eras of automobile history: When the brand new Mercedes A-Class fell over in the moose test, when Stirling Moss won the Mille Miglia in record time, when Ferdinand Porsche amazed the world with an electric car in 1900. Exciting images show the viewer what really happened. Contemporary witnesses report on their experiences. In 1997 Ferrari celebrated the company's 50th birthday. At that time, Wolfgang Rother followed the Ferrari myth and collected his first driving impressions with the Ferrari 550 Maranello. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg takes the audience to the Klassikwelt Bodensee in Friedrichshafen, an event that is much more than a classic car fair. In addition to vintage and youngtimers, visitors can expect a varied program with demonstration drives of historic racing cars, an air show, a historic paddock and numerous encounters with collectors, racing drivers and enthusiasts. Top Speed ​​discovers why the Klassikwelt Bodensee is one of the most diverse classical events in Europe. (Station info).

programme.title: Top Speed Classic
programme.desc: Moderator Martin Utberg takes part in the Spalatin Historic, a one-day classic car rally in aid of a good cause. Together with organizer Stefan von Heyden, Martin discovers the Franconian region. During the various breaks, entertaining special stages ensure many smiling faces among participants and spectators. In this program, Top Speed ​​also takes viewers to Lucerne, where Martin gets involved behind the scenes at a classic car auction by the Oldtimer Galerie Toffen at the Swiss Classic World. (Station info).

programme.title: Isle of Man Tourist Trophy
programme.desc: The highlight of every TT, the Senior TT. Hicky is considered the favorite, but 6 rounds have to be completed first. Can Harrison crack it this time or will Michael Dunlop rise from the ashes like Phoenix after 2 Supersport wins this week? Questions about questions – they are answered here. (Station info).

programme.desc: The seventh season of the Going Pro TV series follows Damon Surzyshyn and the entire PROsport Racing team in the 2026 ADAC GT4 Germany season (channel info).

programme.title: Fastzone 2026
programme.desc: The show takes the audience into the fascinating world of international racing. The format combines thrilling motorsport action with in-depth analysis and provides a comprehensive overview of important racing series around the globe. In addition to spectacular scenes on the track, the format offers exciting background reports, technical insights and stories about drivers, teams and their challenges. This creates a diverse look at speed, competition and the passion that drives motorsport worldwide. (Station info).

programme.title: Biker Lifestyle
programme.desc: The north of Thailand is a popular travel destination, not just for adventurous individual tourists. The north is known for its mountainous, densely forested areas and therefore this region is also a paradise for motorcyclists. Thousands of curves on well-developed roads with little traffic and a diversity of culture and landscape make this region a perfect holiday destination for us to escape the winter in Germany for the fourth time. We will take you on a 1600 km long motorcycle tour to the most beautiful places in northern Thailand. (Station info).

programme.title: Green wave
programme.desc: Today's show is all about: premium performance. Because these two crackers deliver both in their own, unique way and with future-oriented drives. programme.title: NZ Jetsprint Championship 2025
programme.desc: The New Zealand Jetsprint Championship is the most important sprint boat competition from New Zealand, the country where the sport was founded in 1981. Jetsprinting is comparable to rally sports, but there is only one boat on the track at any given time and boats drive at very high speeds. The up to 500 HP strong jet sprint boats therefore try to achieve the best time on the tracks. (Senderinfo).

programme.title: Motorcycles
programme.sub-title: Icon of the New Heritage wave: BMW R nineT
programme.desc: In 2013, the BMW R nineT, a puristic retro roadster, came onto the market that one would not have expected from the brand from Munich, which is considered to be conservative. The modern technology is deliberately prepared for individual conversion to custom bikes, which are becoming increasingly popular in the young motorcycle scene worldwide. The program shows the idea behind the concept of the retro roadster and what qualities and possible weaknesses the classic boxer motorcycle reveals in practical testing.

programme.desc: The program discusses why the International Motor Show is moving to Munich. The number of visitors has been declining for several years and in Munich visitors can visit the free open space and take test drives.

programme.desc: Klaus Niedzwiedz makes his way to the Hockenheimring in the Porsche Taycan.

programme.title: You Cant Win Em All
programme.desc: As the Ottoman Empire collapses throughout Turkey in 1922, a number of adventurers from all over the world sign on to protect the locals from thieves and marauders--for a hefty price. Two such mercenaries are Adam and Josh, who are hired by provincial Turkish governor Osman. Adam and Josh are expected to protect their boss' gold shipment, and to provide safe conduct for Osman Bey's three daughters. Along the way, our 'heroes' decide to forget their mission and abscond with the gold, but their plans are foiled by their own inherent ineptitude--and by the bothersome interference of duplicitous Colonel Elci.

programme.title: Bloody Friday
programme.desc: After escaping from a courtroom during his trial, a major criminal plans the biggest bank robbery ever to have taken place in the country.

programme.title: The Glass House
programme.desc: After the parents of Ruby (Leelee Sobieski) and her younger brother, Rhett (Trevor Morgan), are killed in a car crash, their parents' best friends, Erin and Terry Glass (Diane Lane, Stellan Skarsgard), become their guardians. The children hear promises of a world of opulence and California fun -- all they have to do is move into the Glasses' gated house. Before very long, though, Ruby suspects that Erin and Terry may not be the ideal guardians they seemed to be.

programme.title: If You Meet Sartana... Pray for Your Death

It is up to the legendary hero Sartana to track down the missing money and determine just who is ultimately behind the grisly robberies and killings.

programme.title: The Glass House
programme.desc: After the parents of Ruby (Leelee Sobieski) and her younger brother, Rhett (Trevor Morgan), are killed in a car crash, their parents' best friends, Erin and Terry Glass (Diane Lane, Stellan Skarsgard), become their guardians. Before very long, though, Ruby suspects that Erin and Terry may not be the ideal guardians they seemed to be.

programme.title: The Last Anniversary

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: LamborghiniThe myth of the Lamborghini begins with the name. In the bullring of Córdoba in 1879, a bull survived despite being stabbed 24 times. Its name was Murciélago - just like the Lamborghini coupe that was presented at the Frankfurt IAA in 2001.

programme.title: Nordschleife

programme.title: Perfect Ride

programme.desc: S2 E16 — Colin Chapman's Kit-CarSuper Seven: When you hear these words, every car fan first thinks of Lotus. Colin Chapman developed the open kit racer, i.e. a kit car, in the 1950s.

programme.desc: S3 E35 — Episode 35Among the Gulf oil states, there is an exclusive group of people who like it "mini." Fans come to the mini-festival from all over Arabia. But the research for “mini” crazy people starts right there, in Dubai.
